sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116104" key="w)kuge/neqlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠκυ-γένεθλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n116104.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quickly born</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gendered,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἰς τόκον</foreign> <pb n="2032" TEIform="pb"/> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὠκυγένεθλον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2578.tlg001:2:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Jo.Gaz.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ecphr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.59</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
